A11Y.DOWNLOAD_CV__LABEL: Download Adam Varga's CV as a PDF

PHYSIONOW.TITLE: PhysioNow clinic website and booking system development
PHYSIONOW.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_1__TEXT: Built a full-stack appointment booking system with Angular, Hono.js, SQLite (D1), and Cloudflare Workers.
PHYSIONOW.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_2__TEXT: Implemented admin panel for managing employee schedules, appointments, and patient data.
PHYSIONOW.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_3__TEXT: Integrated AWS-based email notifications for booking workflows.

MULTITENANT_IDEATOR.TITLE: Multitenant Ideation Platform
MULTITENANT_IDEATOR.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_1__TEXT: Built a full-stack multitenant ideation platform using Angular and Spring Boot (Kotlin).
MULTITENANT_IDEATOR.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_2__TEXT: Implemented structured workflows for idea lifecycle management (creation, evaluation, completion).
MULTITENANT_IDEATOR.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_3__TEXT: Designed a multitenant SaaS architecture with role-based access control.
MULTITENANT_IDEATOR.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_4__TEXT: Enabled secure, isolated environments for multiple organizations.

A11Y.IMAGE_ALT__TEXT: Preview of the Multitenant Ideation Platform

CRAFT_HACK.TITLE: CraftHack 2021 Grand Winner
CRAFT_HACK.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_1__TEXT: Won first place in an international hackathon (UI challenge by EPAM)
CRAFT_HACK.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_2__TEXT: Designed a mobile platform concept connecting remote and office employees

SIMONYI_KONF.TITLE: Lead Graphic Designer @ XVIII. Simonyi Konferencia
SIMONYI_KONF.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_1__TEXT: I led the graphic design for the XVIII Simonyi Conference, coordinating the team’s work through weekly meetings where we tracked progress, addressed blockers, and ensured deadlines were met.
SIMONYI_KONF.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_2__TEXT: My responsibilities included communicating with other team leads during event planning, aligning with the Head of PR on visual materials, and assigning tasks to team members.

SCHDESIGN.TITLE: Vector Graphics Mentor @ Schönherz Design Studio
SCHDESIGN.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_1__TEXT: For one year, I supported new graphic design projects as a Vector Graphics mentor, helping team members with ideas and technical guidance.
SCHDESIGN.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_2__TEXT: Additionally, I conducted interviews and assisted applicants in completing their admission projects and joining the schdesign community.

MASTER.SCHOOL__TEXT: Budapest University of Technology and Economics

BACHELOR.SCHOOL__TEXT: Budapest University of Technology and Economics

ENGINEER.TITLE: Software Engineer
ENGINEER.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_1__TEXT: Developed and maintained a high-volume notification engine handling SMS, email, and push notifications for Telekom Hungary using Spring Boot (Kotlin).
ENGINEER.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_2__TEXT: Contributed to frontend development with Angular, including implementing UI updates for the Telekom webshop based on a new design system and component library.
ENGINEER.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_3__TEXT: Developing customer self-service features (billing, permissions, subscription management) using Angular and RxJS.

ENGINEER.TITLE: Front-end Developer
ENGINEER.DESCRIPTION_PARAGRAPH_1__TEXT: Developed and maintained a large-scale government web application (5+ years in production) for accounting, project financing, and data management using Angular, RxJS, and Angular Material, delivering new features, handling client change requests, and resolving bugs in complex, data-driven interfaces.

ABOUT_ME.TEXT: Software Engineer with experience building large-scale backend systems and modern Angular applications. Experienced in high-volume systems and customer-facing features, with a strong focus on clean architecture, maintainable code, practical solutions and attention to detail in UI and user experience.
